projects.supportedFormats: Supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM
projects.dragToStart: Drag and drop video files above to get started

settings.title: Settings
settings.transcriptionHelp: One key per line. Multiple keys rotate automatically to avoid rate limits. Get yours at <link>console.groq.com</link>
settings.rateLimitNoData: No usage data yet (updates after API use)

player.transcribeNoKey: Please set Groq Whisper API Key in Settings first
player.autoRefineTooltip: After transcription, automatically re-transcribe low-confidence segments with surrounding context as prompt. Uses extra API quota.
player.selectModeTooltip: Select multiple consecutive segments to re-transcribe together (shift-click to extend range)
player.enhanceTranscriptTooltip: Use AI to extract terms from the current transcript; next transcription will use them
player.enhanceTranscriptDesc: AI extracts likely proper nouns (names, games, catchphrases) from the current transcript. Pick the correct ones; next transcription will use them as a Whisper prompt.
player.noVocabularyFound: No vocabulary extracted; you can add manually below
player.vocabSavedPrompt: Vocabulary saved. Next transcription will use these as a prompt.
player.copyYouTubeChaptersTooltip: Copy as YouTube chapter format; paste into video description
player.exportBurnSubtitlesTooltip: Burn subtitles into the video (slower, but always visible)
